notes: Validity of an argument form (def:argument-form) is truth preservation: every assignment satisfying Gamma satisfies phi -- i.e. Gamma is a logical consequence (def:logical-consequence), spelled out via def:satisfaction. 'every truth assignment' rides on def:satisfaction (transitive), and def:satisfaction may itself be transitive through def:logical-consequence; reviewer may trim to {argument-form, logical-consequence}. Kept as listed.
